name: Agent Health Monitor
description: Scans all active agents for consecutive n8n execution errors. Flags agents with >=1 consecutive error. Auto-pauses agents at >=3 consecutive errors (PATCH status=paused in agent_registry). Writes full scan report to experimental_outputs + audit_log on every run. Notifies via sandbox_notify (rate-limited) if issues found. Webhook: POST /webhook/agent-health-monitor.

parameters.body: JSON.stringify({ agent_name, experiment_id, output_type: 'health_scan', content: {scan_time, total_agents_checked, agents_with_issues, agents_retiring, summary, issues, retiring}, confidence: 1.0 })

JSON.stringify({ actor: 'agent_health_monitor', action: 'write_experimental_output', target: 'experimental_outputs', details: {scan_time, total_agents_checked, agents_with_issues, agents_retiring, summary} })

JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'agent_health_monitor', message: '🔴 Health scan: N agent(s) with consecutive errors (M need retirement). Issues: ...', trigger_url: 'http://localhost:5678/webhook/agent-health-monitor' })
JSON.stringify({ actor: 'agent_health_monitor', action: 'sandbox_notify_sent', target: 'sandbox_notify', details: {agents_with_issues, agents_retiring, summary} })
JSON.stringify({ agent_name: 'agent_health_monitor', message: '🚨 AUTO-RETIRED: agent_name had N consecutive errors. Status=paused. Run /activate_agent agent_name to restore.', trigger_url: '...' })

connections.Webhook -> Get Active Agents -> Get Exec: parallel branches from Write Audit Log
